children.text:
This release is all about performance! We are taking every part of the app, from loading speeds to scrolling smoothness, and given it a nice boost … more to come in next releases.

We've also introduced ads. We know ads aren't sexy, so we're working on integrating them as unobtrusively as possible. Let us know what you think!

Other changes:
- Added HTTPS support for additional security
- Fixed the wonky swipe gesture in the news header
- Improved user experience in the article screen
- General performance and stability improvements
